channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: YouTube’s mobile app finally lets you share timestamped videos
item.description: YouTube is making some changes that might affect how you share videos from the mobile app. From the app, you can finally share videos from a specific timestamp, which will make it easier to point someone to a part of a video you might want them to see while you're on your phone. However, this […]

item.title: How to watch American Gladiators reboot online from anywhere
item.description: Here's how to watch American Gladiators (2026) reboot online from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Friday, April 17 (game #1544)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Friday, April 17 (game #775)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Friday, April 17 (game #1041)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: Factory hits $1.5B valuation to build AI coding for enterprises
item.description: The three-year-old startup raised $150 million led by Khosla Ventures.

item.title: We’ve Seen the First 18 Minutes of ‘The Mandalorian and Grogu’
item.description: The footage played at CinemaCon in Las Vegas, featuring Pedro Pascal and a bunch of AT-ATs.

item.title: A 'Sputnik' moment for chips: Chinese scientists aim to save Moore’s Law by mass-growing 2D materials that 'outclass silicon'
item.description: Chinese researchers grew 2D semiconductor films 1,000x faster using a liquid gold substrate, addressing the missing p-type material bottleneck.

item.title: The New ‘Mandalorian and Grogu’ Trailer Amps Up the Nostalgia
item.description: Disney would *really* like to remind you that 'Star Wars' is back in theaters in a month now.

item.title: The DJI Flip is close to its lowest-ever price on Amazon — shop now and save $100 on this 4K drone
item.description: As of April 16, get the DJI Flip for just $539. That saves you $100 off its list price, nearly bringing it back to its lowest price ever.

item.title: Luma launches AI-powered production studio with faith-focused Wonder Project
item.description: The studio's first project will be about Moses and star Academy Award-winner Ben Kingsley, to be released this spring on Prime Video.
